_comment: Declarative project registry. Authored from observed evidence (git remotes + corpus tokens), conservative: no project is invented without evidence. NOT yet wired into live MCP scope resolution; measured via `project-coverage --registry`. PR-3C checkpoint: added jbcodingiot web aliases; folded PeopleSynapse-v1 as an archived repo (no v1-specific tokens). Paperclip is an EXTERNAL orchestrator tool (paperclipai), not a project — its knowledge belongs to jbcodingiot (lineage stays in neuron domain/tags), so it is intentionally absent here. Review/edit by PR.

repos.note: bare mirror of the app repo

projects.note: 509 corpus neurons; repo dir name does not alias-resolve to the canonical without this entry

repos.note: distinct GitHub repo (ASINOSE12345/PeopleSynapse-v1), superseded by v2. Folded here (PR-3C): no v1-specific corpus tokens, so not a separate project.
second local checkout of the SAME GitHub repo (branch docs/progress-map)
separate GitHub repo; web component of the same product

projects.note: modeled as one product with core + web component repos (not interchangeable aliases)
platform/factory-wide knowledge is global scope; these repos are covered by global neurons, not project-specific ones
